For defect 501198, we implemented countermeasures against resets, but the issue of slow boot-up remained when inserting old SD cards with abnormally slow access speeds or faulty SD cards that cannot be accessed. dash cam.

■Cause: By解除walking restrictions, the finishDvrScreen function was called, so I performed clearBackStack(), but there were 2 DVRFragments in the BackStack, and by deleting them one by one, a phenomenon where the DVR screen momentarily remains (flickers) occurred. ■Countermeasure: In the finishDvrScreen function, the clearBackStack process is unnecessary, so delete clearBackStack..

During PinP display while expanding the guide diagram, REV-ON/OFF was performed and travel started. After cancelling the expanded diagram, PinP is not displayed..
System.
PinP.
ST.
Correction step number: 4 Test cases: 30 Add confirmation of five modes, NaviEnlargeView mode, NaviMapScroll mode, NaviVicsHigh mode, NaviVicsLow mode, and NewAndOldRoute mode, for the topmost mode check at the time of black screen deletion notification under PinP display conditions..
※Preconditions Vehicle: ( ) Display: Current location_PinP Audio: TV Route guidance: Available ※Driving east on National Route 9 (MC:189886527 11 area) Route destination: Tottori City, Wakaba-cho Naniwa 7-5-1 Connected devices: As follows ・BT: Not connected ・Wi-Fi: Not connected Vehicle signal: PKB-ON/SPEED-ON.
1. While navigating the route, drive east on National Route 9 (MC:189886527 11 area) towards the destination (Tottori City Wakaba-tennan 7-5-1). 2. Ignore the route and stop by Michinoeki Oae (MC:189886442 52). 3. Match with surrounding roads within the parking lot of Michinoeki and reroute to expand the navigation map. 4. Interrupt the expanded map during REV-ON/OFF and stop. 5. Start driving again to解除the expanded map..
Current location_PinP screen (TV) + During route guidance, when deviating from the route to stop at Michinoeki Ooie (MC:189886442 52), it matched with周边道路 and performed a re-route, causing an enlarged map to interrupt. While the enlarged map was interrupting, REV-ON/OFF was done while parked, and after starting to drive again, the enlarged map did not解除 and PinP was not displayed. Even driving for a while longer did not resolve the issue. It returned to normal by transitioning to the current location via HOME screen > TS[Information·Settings] > AllApps screen > ESW[Current Location]..
After解除ing the enlarged guide diagram, display the PinP screen..
2-1.No Use Case/Insufficient Use Cases.
Cause Description: pinp\Idle.java When performing REV ON/OFF, a PinP display request is made at the black screen deletion notification trigger sent during REV OFF. The PinP display condition states that it should not be displayed if the highest mode at the time of the black screen deletion notification is other than NaviMap mode. In this case, the highest mode is NaviEnlargeView, so even when the enlarged view is turned off, the PinP is not being displayed, causing the issue.

① The sales store diag GPS information screen is being displayed while driving from a location where GPS reception is possible to a location where GPS is not received. ② Confirm the following reception status on the GPS information screen←★NG occurs • Number of received satellites in the celestial map • Supplement count.
Sales store diag > Option settings > GPS information screen (SY-HDG-200) display state, when driving to a GPS reception impossible location such as a tunnel or underground parking lot, the GPS mark: number of receptions 4, captured number display shows "4" and does not show "0"..
When the GPS signal is lost, the GPS mark on the star chart should indicate a loss of signal or become non-displayed. The supplementary number display should show "0" or be non-displayed..

Therefore, until the next GPS reception, the GPS data immediately before the transition from GPS reception to no GPS reception will continue to be displayed.

Updating AM/FM broadcast station list ACC disconnection → Manual update of station list results in failure to detect broadcast stations.
Audio.
AM_FM.
Illegal Behavior/Incorrect Action.
Radio.
ST.
AudioPF.
AudioPF.
When executing ACC OFF, if the previous source was FM/AM, issue a radio switch request (OFF) and then execute a radio switch request (FM or AM). Before the completion of the audio OFF power switch, the above-mentioned wireless power switch was requested..
Vehicle: Desktop Environment Actual Machine: Display: RD_AM Screen Audio: AM The radio preset mode should be "Broadcast List" The received electric field of the radio should have receivable broadcast stations in the Broadcast List Connected Devices: RADIO ANT Vehicle Signals: ACC ON, PKB ON, SPD OFF (0km), REV OFF, TAIL OFF.
① Press [List Update] → Manual update of the broadcast station list begins ※ ONS "Cannot operate during broadcast station search" is displayed ② During manual update of the broadcast station list, perform ACC momentary disconnection ※ ACC momentary disconnection involves turning OFF/ON within less than 1 second ※ When ACC momentarily disconnects, the backlight will turn off for a moment but quickly returns to displaying ONS "Cannot operate during broadcast station search" ③ No operation until completion of broadcast station list update → ONS "No receivable broadcast stations TS[OK]" is displayed ★NG occurs ④ Press TS[OK] → ONS disappears ⑤ Press [List Update] → ONS "No receivable broadcast stations TS[OK]" is displayed ★NG occurs.
During the ACC disconnection performed while updating the radio station list, the receivable radio stations will not be extracted during manual update of the station list, and ONS "No available broadcast stations" will be displayed. If you perform a manual update of the station list again after displaying ONS "No available broadcast stations", ONS "No available broadcast stations" will be displayed immediately after the manual update operation, making it impossible to manually update the station list..
When manually updating the broadcast station list, search for receivable broadcast stations and extract up to 12 stations in order of reception sensitivity as the "Broadcast Station List.".
2-1.No Use Case/Insufficient Use Cases.
Consideration遗漏 in ACC instantaneous disconnection. It has entered a path where source switching is not executed after radio switch request (OFF).

After moving the drive recorder app shortcut, if you turn ACC OFF/ON, the app position changes..
Vehicle.
Drive recorder integration.
Illegal Behavior/Incorrect Action.
Home (wallpaper).
ST.
App/App_Home.
App/App_Home.
From ACC-ON until the first HOME movement within 10 seconds, the status is not fixed, no use is made, the status is determined immediately, and the status before ACC OFF is changed..
・Drive recorder + front camera ( ) connected ・Display: Home screen ・Audio: BTA.
① Move the drive recorder app to the second page ② Turn ACC OFF (for more than 5 seconds) / ON.
After moving the drive recorder app shortcut, if you turn ACC OFF/ON, the app position changes..
After moving the drive recorder app shortcut, performing ACC OFF/ON does not change the app position..
1-2.Unclear Requirements/Requirements are not clear.
Defect 569160 Root Cause In ACC OFF state, the Dvr disconnects, and after turning ACC ON, it takes a while to reconnect. Therefore, when switching between ACC OFF/ON, the status transitions as follows: disconnect - boot (disconnect) - about 10 seconds - connection complete. Due to this disconnection, the app shortcut is deleted during the disconnect phase and added at an arbitrary position upon reconnection, which can result in it not being added where the user originally placed it, causing the issue.

[Navi]After Heat Run, the navigation app crashes due to inactivity..
Navi.
Navigation common.
App crash.
Navi.
NaviApp.
Clear the list (vector) of icon rectangle information for collision detection at the timing when updating the FBO for rendering..
Display: AM Audio: AM • Connected to rear seat • TV antenna connected • Radio antenna connected • Route setting: Available (with driving) • Bluetooth connection available • Wi-Fi connection available • Stack more than 7 activities and NaviApp's Activity (name search) is older than 7th position • ACC on.
No operation.
After heat run, the navigation app crashes due to inactivity. ■Supplement · Although it does not recover with ACC off/on as shown in the video, we have confirmed that it recovers after turning ACC on about 10 minutes after ACC off. · The heat run operation time is over 80 hours..
The nav app does not crash even when left idle after a heat run..
5-5. Remains of Past Design/Left as It Was from Past Design.
At the time of drawing execution, I am creating a list (vector array) of icon rectangle information for collision detection. However, this list is replaced with a new one after display execution. Therefore, in cases where display completion does not occur due to drawing cancellation or similar issues, the list continues to be registered without being cleared, resulting in unexpected memory allocation continuing indefinitely.

Correction step number: 4 Test cases: 30 Add confirmation of five modes, NaviEnlargeView mode, NaviMapScroll mode, NaviVicsHigh mode, NaviVicsLow mode, and NewAndOldRoute mode, for the topmost mode check at the time of black screen deletion notification under PinP display conditions..
※Preconditions Vehicle: ( ) Display: Current location_PinP Audio: TV Route guidance: Available ※Driving east on National Route 9 (MC:189886527 11 area) Route destination: Tottori City, Wakaba-cho Naniwa 7-5-1 Connected devices: As follows ・BT: Not connected ・Wi-Fi: Not connected Vehicle signal: PKB-ON/SPEED-ON.
1. While navigating the route, drive east on National Route 9 (MC:189886527 11 area) towards the destination (Tottori City Wakaba-tennan 7-5-1). 2. Ignore the route and stop by Michinoeki Oae (MC:189886442 52). 3. Match with surrounding roads within the parking lot of Michinoeki and reroute to expand the navigation map. 4. Interrupt the expanded map during REV-ON/OFF and stop. 5. Start driving again to解除the expanded map..
Current location_PinP screen (TV) + During route guidance, when deviating from the route to stop at Michinoeki Ooie (MC:189886442 52), it matched with周边道路 and performed a re-route, causing an enlarged map to interrupt. While the enlarged map was interrupting, REV-ON/OFF was done while parked, and after starting to drive again, the enlarged map did not解除 and PinP was not displayed. Even driving for a while longer did not resolve the issue. It returned to normal by transitioning to the current location via HOME screen > TS[Information·Settings] > AllApps screen > ESW[Current Location]..
After解除ing the enlarged guide diagram, display the PinP screen..
2-1.No Use Case/Insufficient Use Cases.
Cause Description: pinp\Idle.java When performing REV ON/OFF, a PinP display request is made at the black screen deletion notification trigger sent during REV OFF. The PinP display condition states that it should not be displayed if the highest mode at the time of the black screen deletion notification is other than NaviMap mode. In this case, the highest mode is NaviEnlargeView, so even when the enlarged view is turned off, the PinP is not being displayed, causing the issue.

For defect 501198, we implemented countermeasures against resets, but the issue of slow boot-up remained when inserting old SD cards with abnormally slow access speeds or faulty SD cards that cannot be accessed. ① Press [List Update] → Manual update of the broadcast station list begins ※ ONS "Cannot operate during broadcast station search" is displayed ② During manual update of the broadcast station list, perform ACC momentary disconnection ※ ACC momentary disconnection involves turning OFF/ON within less than 1 second ※ When ACC momentarily disconnects, the backlight will turn off for a moment but quickly returns to displaying ONS "Cannot operate during broadcast station search" ③ No operation until completion of broadcast station list update → ONS "No receivable broadcast stations TS[OK]" is displayed ★NG occurs ④ Press TS[OK] → ONS disappears ⑤ Press [List Update] → ONS "No receivable broadcast stations TS[OK]" is displayed ★NG occurs.
During the ACC disconnection performed while updating the radio station list, the receivable radio stations will not be extracted during manual update of the station list, and ONS "No available broadcast stations" will be displayed. If you perform a manual update of the station list again after displaying ONS "No available broadcast stations", ONS "No available broadcast stations" will be displayed immediately after the manual update operation, making it impossible to manually update the station list..
When manually updating the broadcast station list, search for receivable broadcast stations and extract up to 12 stations in order of reception sensitivity as the "Broadcast Station List.".

1-2.Unclear Requirements/Requirements are not clear.
Defect 569160 Root Cause In ACC OFF state, the Dvr disconnects, and after turning ACC ON, it takes a while to reconnect. Therefore, when switching between ACC OFF/ON, the status transitions as follows: disconnect - boot (disconnect) - about 10 seconds - connection complete. Due to this disconnection, the app shortcut is deleted during the disconnect phase and added at an arbitrary position upon reconnection, which can result in it not being added where the user originally placed it, causing the issue.

Display: AM Audio: AM • Connected to rear seat • TV antenna connected • Radio antenna connected • Route setting: Available (with driving) • Bluetooth connection available • Wi-Fi connection available • Stack more than 7 activities and NaviApp's Activity (name search) is older than 7th position • ACC on.

After heat run, the navigation app crashes due to inactivity. ■Supplement · Although it does not recover with ACC off/on as shown in the video, we have confirmed that it recovers after turning ACC on about 10 minutes after ACC off. · The heat run operation time is over 80 hours..
The nav app does not crash even when left idle after a heat run..
5-5. Remains of Past Design/Left as It Was from Past Design.
At the time of drawing execution, I am creating a list (vector array) of icon rectangle information for collision detection. However, this list is replaced with a new one after display execution. Therefore, in cases where display completion does not occur due to drawing cancellation or similar issues, the list continues to be registered without being cleared, resulting in unexpected memory allocation continuing indefinitely.
